description: ## Component: hx-alert (UPGRADE) **Tier 1 â€” Universal Foundation | Industry Consensus: 5/6 libraries** Upgrade existing scaffold. Inline notification banner with semantic variants and dismissible behavior. ### ADR-001 Classification: Slot-Driven (Composite) Properties control variant and behavior. Slots accept rich message content from Drupal. ### API Design **Properties:** `variant` (info|success|warning|error), `dismissible` (boolean), `open` (boolean, default true), `icon` (boolean, show default icon per variant) **Slots:** Default (message content â€” rich HTML from Drupal), `icon` (custom icon), `actions` (action buttons) **CSS Parts:** `alert`, `icon`, `message`, `close-button`, `actions` **Events:** `hx-dismiss` (composed: true), `hx-after-dismiss` (after animation) ### Drupal Integration ```twig {# Drupal status messages #} {% for message in messages %} {{ message.message|raw }} {% if message.link %} View Details {% endif %} {% endfor %} {# Drupal AJAX response alert #} Patient record {{ patient.label }} saved successfully. ``` Message content is slot-driven â€” Drupal can include rich HTML (bold, links, lists) in alert messages. This is critical for Drupal's status message system which outputs HTML. ### Healthcare: HIPAA warnings, patient alerts, medication interactions, system status ### Acceptance Criteria 1. All 4 semantic variants with appropriate default icons 2. Dismissible mode with smooth close animation 3. Default slot accepts rich HTML (Drupal status messages include links/bold) 4. Actions slot for related action buttons 5. Custom icon slot overrides default variant icon 6. WCAG 2.1 AA: alert/status role, aria-live
title: T1-24: hx-alert â€” Inline Notification Banner
